title: Manifest
description: Testing manifest that tells the persona-browser-agent what pages exist, what to test, and how to verify results.

pages.description: Pages that the agent should visit and validate.

tasks.description: Free-form task instructions for the agent.

verification_tasks.description: Structured verification tasks to run after navigation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this page, matching the codeintel page id where applicable.

purpose.description: Human-readable description of what this page is for.

how_to_reach.description: Instructions for navigating to this page (e.g. route, click path).

expected_features.description: Features or UI elements that should be present on this page.

auth_required.description: Whether authentication is required to access this page.

expected_data.description: Data items or content that should appear on this page.

AuthFlow.description: Describes the authentication flow to test.

auth_action.description: The action to perform to authenticate (e.g. 'login with test credentials').

verify_auth_persistence.description: Whether to verify that auth state persists across page navigations.

verify_logout.description: Whether to verify that logout clears auth state.

UnauthenticatedBehavior.description: Expected behavior when an unauthenticated user accesses a protected resource.

expected.description: Human-readable description of what should happen (e.g. redirect to /login).

test.description: Instructions for how to test this behavior.

id.description: Unique identifier for this verification task.

description.description: Human-readable description of what is being verified.

check.description: Instructions or assertion to perform the verification.

derived_from.description: Reference to the codeintel data flow or endpoint this task was derived from.
